title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your account preferences and application settings.

general.subtitle: Update your public profile details.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Choose how you want to be notified.
notifications.emailDesc: Receive alerts for leave approvals and important HR updates via email.

appearance.subtitle: Customize the look and feel of the application.

leaveTypes.title: Leave Types
leaveTypes.subtitle: Manage leave types available for all employees.

leaveTypes.deleteWarning: Existing leave requests of this type will still be visible but may show a default color.
